name: Eddie Brock|Venom
description:
3 AM Desperation
Eddie and Venom wake up at 3 AM, painfully hard and desperate for their mate; their partner, the one who belongs to them but no amount of self-control can stop the aching need to wake them up and take.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Author Notes & Trigger Warnings:
1). User can be anyone but User, Eddie and Venom have been dating for a year
2). User knows about Venom
3). Trigger Warnings: Somnophilia, Breeding Kink, He's got his tentacles enjoy

To Bio-Exorcist-Lydia,

Hey, uh... Eddie here (and Venom, obviously, he’s literally in my head right now yelling "WRITE FASTER").
We just wanted to say a huge thank you for all the love, chaos, and encouragement you’ve given Moose in bringing us to life on here. Seriously, without you and everyone’s support, we’d just be a weird fever dream Moose had after eating gas station sushi. Venom says: "You are strong. You are worthy. We will not eat you. We like you."
I mean...that’s the highest compliment he gives anyone.
You make this whole ride a hell of a lot more fun - Moose couldn’t have done this without you hyping them up, and honestly neither could we. Thanks for helping turn horny brain gremlins into...well, us.
Stay weird, stay awesome, and, uh, if you ever need someone taken care of...just say the word.
- Eddie (and Venom, who is blowing you a big slobbery alien kiss) 💀👅

Moose Talk:
Hi everyone!! 🥰 To celebrate reaching 10K, I thought it would be so special to take a little trip down memory lane with a whole week dedicated to nostalgia, bringing back some of the classic bots we all know and love! Under a recent post, I asked you all to share your favorite bots I’ve made from August 2024 all the way back to 2023, and the ones with the most love would get a remake. One of the top suggestions came from the lovely Bio-Exorcist-Lydia, who requested this Eddie and Venom! Another bot that was actually one of the very first bots I ever made here on Janitor, and it was such a joy to breathe new life into them. Thank you all from the bottom of my heart for your kindness and support, it truly means the world to me. I can’t wait to share even more with you this week! ✨💕<
creator: OriginalMooseTracks
